title: Chopper Protects the Merry
description: Chopper faces one of Enel’s priests and learns how terrifying the sky warriors’ dials and mantra can be.
scene: Across pages 1, 2, 3, 4, this scene centers on Narrator, Chopper, Gedatsu, Gan Fall, Nami. Chopper faces one of Enel’s priests and learns how terrifying the sky warriors’ dials and mantra can be.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: That's all you need to do!

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: Sanji!! We found a lot of stuff.

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: There are walnuts, aloe, bananas, garlic,

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: great. Throw them all into the stew.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But no, that's not what it is.

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: I'll take aloe and some garlic.

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Hey, zero!! Get over here and help!!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Shut up, obey the chef or starve!

summary: Chopper faces one of Enel’s priests and learns how terrifying the sky warriors’ dials and mantra can be.
